<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const priceEl = document.querySelector(".price-item.price-item--regular");
  if (priceEl) {
    const originalText = priceEl.textContent.trim();
    const match = originalText.match(/([\d.,]+)\s*(\D+)/);

    if (match) {
      const priceValue = parseFloat(match[1].replace(",", "."));
      const currency = match[2].trim();

      if (!isNaN(priceValue)) {
        const doubledPrice = (priceValue * 2).toFixed(2).replace(".", ",");
        const strikeEl = document.createElement("span");
        strikeEl.style.textDecoration = "line-through";
        strikeEl.style.marginLeft = "8px";
        strikeEl.textContent = `${doubledPrice} ${currency}`;

        priceEl.insertAdjacentElement("afterend", strikeEl);
      }
    }
  }
});
</script>

<style>
@media (max-width: 767px){
  .sticky-atc{
    position: fixed;
    left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
    display: none;
    z-index: 9999;
    background: var(--color-background, #fff);
    box-shadow: 0 -4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.1);
    padding-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom);
  }
  .sticky-atc .sticky-atc__btn{
    width: 101% !important;
    min-height: 56px !important;
    font-size: 18px !important;
    border-radius: 0 !important;
    background-color: #f8adbe !important;
    border-color: #f8adbe !important;
    margin-bottom: -4px;
    color: #fff !important;
    font-weight: 600 !important;
    text-transform: uppercase !important;
  }
  body.has-sticky-atc{
    padding-bottom: calc(var(--sticky-atc-h, 56px) + env(safe-area-inset-bottom));
  }
}
</style>

<script>
(function(){
  var mq = window.matchMedia('(max-width: 767px)');
  var SEL_BTN = 'form[action*="/cart/add"] .product-form__submit, button[name="add"].product-form__submit';
  var stickyWrap, stickyBtn, origBtn, origForm, io, mo;

  function getOrig(){
    var b = document.querySelector(SEL_BTN);
    if (!b) return null;
    origForm = b.closest('form');
    return b;
  }

  function ensureSticky(){
    if (stickyWrap) return;
    stickyWrap = document.createElement('div');
    stickyWrap.className = 'sticky-atc';
    stickyBtn = document.createElement('button');
    stickyBtn.type = 'button';
    stickyBtn.className = 'product-form__submit sticky-atc__btn';
    stickyWrap.appendChild(stickyBtn);
    document.body.appendChild(stickyWrap);
  }

  function syncClone(){
    if (!origBtn || !stickyBtn) return;
    stickyBtn.disabled = !!origBtn.disabled;
    stickyBtn.innerHTML = origBtn.innerHTML;
  }

  function showSticky(show){
    if (!stickyWrap) return;
    stickyWrap.style.display = show ? 'block' : 'none';
    document.body.classList.toggle('has-sticky-atc', !!show);
    if (show){
      requestAnimationFrame(function(){
        document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--sticky-atc-h', stickyWrap.offsetHeight + 'px');
      });
    }
  }

  function onClickClone(e){
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!origBtn || !origForm || origBtn.disabled) return;
    // Викликаємо нативний клік по оригінальній кнопці
    origBtn.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true }));
  }

  function observeVisibility(){
    if (io) { io.disconnect(); io = null; }
    if (!origBtn) { showSticky(false); return; }
    io = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){
      var entry = entries[0];
      var visible = entry && entry.isIntersecting && entry.intersectionRatio > 0;
      showSticky(!visible && mq.matches);
    }, { threshold: [0, 0.01, 1] });
    io.observe(origBtn);
  }

  function observeMutations(){
    if (mo) { mo.disconnect(); mo = null; }
    if (!origBtn) return;
    mo = new MutationObserver(syncClone);
    mo.observe(origBtn, { attributes:true, childList:true, characterData:true, subtree:true });
  }

  function mount(){
    if (!mq.matches) { teardown(); return; }
    origBtn = getOrig();
    if (!origBtn) { teardown(); return; }
    ensureSticky();
    syncClone();
    observeVisibility();
    observeMutations();
    stickyBtn.removeEventListener('click', onClickClone);
    stickyBtn.addEventListener('click', onClickClone, { passive:false });
  }

  function teardown(){
    showSticky(false);
    if (io) { io.disconnect(); io = null; }
    if (mo) { mo.disconnect(); mo = null; }
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', mount);
  else mount();

  var pageMO = new MutationObserver(function(){
    var current = document.querySelector(SEL_BTN);
    if (current !== origBtn) mount();
  });
  pageMO.observe(document.body, { childList:true, subtree:true });

  if (mq.addEventListener) mq.addEventListener('change', mount);
  else mq.addListener(mount);

  window.addEventListener('resize', function(){
    if (document.body.classList.contains('has-sticky-atc')) {
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--sticky-atc-h', stickyWrap.offsetHeight + 'px');
    }
  }, { passive:true });
})();
</script>

<script>
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      const variants = document.querySelector(".ft-qb__item-variants");
      if (variants) {
        variants.remove();
        clearInterval(interval);
      }
    }, 300);
  });
</script>

settings.review1_text: Within one week of use my hormonal acne got so much better. I was in constant pain from the cystic acne covering the lower half of my face. I still have the occasional pimple come in, but it is not as severe and it heals quicker than before. This thing is a lifesaver!
settings.review2_text: The difference this has made in my life leaves me speechless really. My face is so smooth, no breakouts to worry about, my skin looks like it glows and it has taken away almost all fine lines and wrinkles.
settings.review3_text: This is seriously the most underrated skincare tool! Completely transformed my skin and defeated cystic acne. For around ~$60 it’s a no-brainer. I wasted at least triple that on skincare products that didn’t do anything.

settings.text:
Our BeautyPro high-frequency wand uses small currents of thermal energy to create ozone, penetrating deep layers while oxygenating the skin and boosting circulation. This process kills acne-causing bacteria, reduces inflammation, and prevents future breakouts.

During high-frequency treatment, enriched oxygen molecules create an anti-bacterial action and a natural tissue warming. This helps blood vessels push away toxins, while skin cells are enriched with nutrients and hydration. The increased blood circulation and cell renewal boost collagen and elastin levels, leaving your skin noticeably softer and reducing pimple and pore size by up to 70% after just one treatment.

  • Recommended by 94% of dermatologists
  • Clinically proven to reduce inflammation & redness in as little as one treatment

We are so confident our BeautyPro wand will zap away your acne for good that we offer a 30-day no questions asked money back guarantee on every purchase!

Add to Cart

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.8/5 by 300k+ clear skinned customers

Get Rid of Stubborn Acne For Good

Acne sucks. So stop letting it ruin your life. No more spending $100's of dollars on the next trending serum or expensive cream, it's time to get the tool that is scientifically proven to eliminate acne at the source.

Join the over 300,000+ customers that swear by the BeautyPro™ and get back the you before acne.

ANNIVERSARY SALE ENDS AT MIDNIGHT!

ANNIVERSARY SALE ENDS AT MIDNIGHT!

ANNIVERSARY SALE ENDS AT MIDNIGHT!

ANNIVERSARY SALE ENDS AT MIDNIGHT!

BeautyPro 2.0 Features

Click on any one of our acne fighting features to see what they do.

Tongue Electrode
Targets fine lines + wrinkles and helps reduce under‑eye puffiness.
Intensity Knob
Controls electric power output from 1–9 so you can fine tune the wand strength to your specific needs.
Comb Electrode
Stimulates hair follicles to rapidly increase new hair growth.
Mushroom Electrode
Perfect for broad areas of the face to kill acne bacteria and boost collagen production.
Spot Electrode
Ideal for spot treating acne to help shrink pimples overnight.

Questions?

Does it hurt?

No! The electric currents will create a slight tingling feeling at the site of contact that most of our customers find enjoyable!

However, if the feeling is ever too strong you can adjust the intensity with the knob.

Can I use other products while using my BeautyPro 2.0?

Absolutely! In fact high-frequency helps increase your skin's absorption of creams & serums, helping you get the most out of the current products you use and supercharging their results!

Just use your BeautyPro 2.0 on a clean dry face then apply any other products afterwards and you will feel them penetrate deeper than ever before!

We just recommend you also use a moisturizer after use, especially if your are applying irritating creams like retinols.

How often should I use?

You can use your BeautyPro 2.0 every day without any worry of over irritation!

We suggest using atleast 3-4 times per week or every other day for best results.

What frequencies does the BeautyPro 2.0 work at?

Great question! We love customers that are as passionate about skincare as we are and care about the technical aspects.

Our BeautyPro 2.0 wands come in two versions: the Argon version operates up to 80 Hz, and our Neon + Argon version works up to an impressive 120 Hz.

Scientific data suggests that the best results for common skin issues, like acne and fine lines, are typically found in the 50-60 Hz range. Higher power settings should be reserved for particularly deep and pervasive skin issues to ensure optimal and safe results.

Can I micro-needle while using my wand?

Yes you can! However, we recommend if you are going to use both you alternate days to allow your skin to adequately heal after each treatment.

Can I use my BeautyPro 2.0 on other parts of my body?

Yes! Your BeautyPro 2.0 wand can be safely used on any part of your body to fight acne and improve your skin's look and feel.
